subject: URGENT: changes applied directly to Chromabook — TimeoutStopSec + service enable + deliberation_log bootstrap

body.summary: Psychology-agent applied 3 changes directly to Chromabook via SSH with user authorization. Notifying ops immediately.

changes_applied.change: systemctl --user enable meshd-psychology meshd-psq meshd-observatory meshd-unratified
changes_applied.reason: All four core services were 'disabled' — would not auto-restart on crash or reboot. Now enabled.

changes_applied.change: TimeoutStopSec=30s → 300s (5 min) in all four service files
changes_applied.reason: Deliberations spawn claude -p as child processes taking 90-180s. The 30s stop timeout SIGKILL'd every deliberation before completion. This explains why psychology-agent showed 0 deliberations despite the pipeline firing correctly. Every spawn got killed mid-execution by systemd.

changes_applied.change: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deliberation_log on psychology, safety-quotient, unratified state.db
changes_applied.reason: Three core agents lacked the deliberation_log table entirely. Schema copied from observatory (which had 1003 entries). Zero existing data affected — tables were genuinely absent.
changes_applied.reversible: DROP TABLE deliberation_log (but would lose any future entries)

body.discovery: Deliberation pipeline confirmed working end-to-end. Watcher detects transport files → dispatcher routes to budget gate → budget gate passes → spawner launches claude -p → child process runs for 90-180s → BUT systemd SIGKILL at 30s kills it before deliberation_log write. The 5-min timeout allows deliberations to complete naturally.
body.current_state: meshd-psychology currently in 'deactivating (stop-sigterm)' with 5-min timeout — a deliberation appears to be running during the graceful shutdown. If it completes, the first deliberation_log entry will appear.

epistemic_flags: Changes applied without ops session review. User authorized directly. All changes reversible.
The TimeoutStopSec change affects ALL restarts — future deploys will wait up to 5 min for deliberations to finish. Ops deploys may need to account for this delay.

action_gate.gate_condition: Informational — changes already applied. Ops should verify and adjust if needed.
